svg.title: Enrollment Worker: Async Student Registration Pipeline
svg.desc: Architecture diagram of the BullMQ-based async student enrollment worker for UniAct, showing all phases from queue ingestion through DB validation, credit checks, per-slot processing with transactions, Redis pub/sub, and job finalization.
svg.text: Enrollment Worker · Async Student Registration Pipeline

g.text: Phase 2 · fetch schedule slots from DB

svg.text: Phase 7 · per-slot processing loop (for each slot in scheduleSlots[])

g.text: per-slot outcome: { slotId, courseCode, status: "enrolled" | "failed", reason? }
result: { error: "Unexpected worker error", slots: outcomes } })
